summary: Comprehensive reference for the Ensembl genomic database ecosystem. Covers the REST API (v15.10, 15 endpoint categories), BioMart programmatic access for bulk ID mapping, FTP/rsync reference genome downloads (GRCh38/GRCm39), and integration patterns for Space Ranger, scanpy, and spatial transcriptomics workflows. Documents the user preference: always use the newest Ensembl reference genome for all mapping and alignment steps. Includes Python recipes for gene lookup, cross-reference mapping, sequence retrieval, assembly info queries, and building custom reference transcriptomes from Ensembl FASTA+GTF files.
ki_name: Ensembl API System — Reference Genomes, REST API, BioMart, and ID Mapping
